item.title: A story in 2 acts
item.description: I'm so glad that people felt seen when they read this, I know I did. I try to write and tell stories that make you feel seen, too. They're free this week, feel free to grab yourself one on Smashwords: https://inkican.com/smashwords-spring-scifi-free-short-stories/
item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: Images of Note: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
item.description:
YOU UNDERESTIMATE MY POWER
If Scotland and Wales get to recycling, we could mine England and become rich off the resources found in the Trash.
Pinkie Pie!
Humanity is a social species and the people who say we're lone wolves are the ones who wanna make you their slaves.
Everyone says "ooooh Edinburgh is posh, Edinburgers are posh" when in reality this is what a lot of us are like. Once watched a guy run out of a Phonebox in budgie smugglers and run down Shandwick place.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
How is he staying up tho?
Yeah basically
a creechur
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: the craziest decade

item.title: Violence will be increasingly used to silence dissent
item.description:
Non-violent protest and free speech is a constitutionally protect right
This is assault. This is beyond shameful
They smile and laugh at the actions of weak, juvenile brown-nosing sycophants.
Premeditated, physical assault on the right to free speech, actions taken by a civil servant.
Representative Lance Gooden - You can send three free faxes a day to his office: https://gooden.house.gov/about
If you’re going to protest, make sure you bring an American Flag and wave it loudly and proudly so that when they use live rounds on you the whole world will see who they are targeting.
item.dc:creator: TigerRaiders

item.title: What Happened Today #32
item.description: Trump's chaotic playbook unfolds: tariff disturbances, bold territorial boasts, brutal layoffs, and million-dollar dinners while courts and dissenters push back. Spread the word. #resist #GovBriefToday LINKS 1 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/money/2025/03/04/trump-says-a-little-disturbance-from-tariffs/81499139007/ 2 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/trump-tells-congress-that-u-s-will-acquire-greenland-one-way-or-the-other/ar-AA1Agz9d 3 - https://www.nbcnews.com/nbc-out/out-news/judge-blocks-trump-order-funding-institutions-gender-affirming-care-rcna194800 4 - https://www.yahoo.com/news/us-tax-agency-weighs-firing-064752883.html 5 - https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trump-illegally-removed-member-board-protects-government-employees/story?id=119435326 6 - https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/04/trump-hegseth-pentagon-firings-civilian-harm/ 7 - https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqly0zrnnv3o 8 - https://apnews.com/article/census-bureau-commerce-department-howard-lutnick-3a56003b790aedce6e6c8ddd7c6b6943 9 - https://www.axios.com/2025/03/04/trump-maga-inc-fundraiser-cost 10 - https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/commerce-to-overhaul-internet-for-all-plan-expanding-starlink-funding-prospects-74664efc 11 - https://thehill.com/homenews/state-watch/5176568-dc-mayor-suggests-city-will-paint-over-black-lives-matter-plaza-near-white-house/ FIGHTING BACK - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/04/al-green-ejected-trump-address-00212734 Archive - https://govbrief.today

item.title: Windows 10 Let's finish setting up your device
item.description:
Settings > System > Notifications & Actions > Uncheck ''Suggest ways I can finish setting up my device to get the most out of Windows''
Settings > System > Notifications & Actions > Uncheck ''Suggest ways I can finish setting up my device to get the most out of Windows''

item.title: Falling down is allowed.
item.description: Just your Heartwarming thing for Today.
item.dc:creator: Mapconsuela

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1291 (dead poets and living accountants)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
The C r e a t u r e
Mood. I may joke about us being in a simulation, or occasionally say "computer, end simulation" as a joke, but sadly this is reality and we caused it.
This is beautiful and definitely a magic item.
Oh noes.
...I never thought about drinking coffee from a skull cup until I saw this meme. I may have to do this now. This is a statement coming from someone who literally drank *corpse revivers* from a *real skull cup* with my religious studies professor back in undergrad, btw.
Join the side of the poets and live their words, and make the accountants twinge.
Katrin Dirim's art is amazeballs. You may have noticed I share her work a lot, and her work has done a lot to inspire some of the feel of the world I've created for my DND campaign.
However you can.
These birds, the Edible nest swiftlet, literally build their nests out of their saliva. Endangered, of course, because for SOME FUCKING REASON a nest made out of bird spit gets used in a soup that's considered a delicacy.
Hilariously, I once had this same idea.
I love jokes making fun of jeeps, after driving them every day for work. Gives me jokes to tell my tours. I regularly comment thar both cows and lobsters are more aerodynamic than the vehicle we're in when the high winds of march try to send mine skittering across the road.
I would unironically love this in my house.
This is why I tell people the only dumb question is asking about what I LITERALLY just talked about because it shows you were not listening at all.
Hey, how about a new set of knives for your fifth year anniversary?
I really do try to avoid AI shit except for wizard shitposts.
The Caddo seemed to have a stable alliance network with their neighboring policies and didn't seem to show the evidence of intercene warfare like what's seen in Mississipian Culture polities farther north and east, like Etowah and Cahokia.
This is more proof Pratchett is just... amazing.
Inspired by this meme, I actually made one of these, and you know what? It was better than I expected.
Me, every morning to the news.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Whatdoing? Ridiculous! I love you too." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Wednesday dump heavy on Star Trek
item.description:
Seriously want to do this
Damn Sylvia didn’t have to call me out
Wacky twerking inflatable butt shaking tube man!
Welcome new poor! Go get a library card. They have all kinds of cool free stuff… dvds, ebooks, audiobooks, games, tools, etc.
Don’t kill anything you’re not prepared to eat and don’t eat anything you’re not prepared to kill.
I still need to watch Andor.
There’s still beauty in the world.
All cats are anarchists.
Explains why everyone knows your name there.
Amazing. So lifelike!
Moss is so cool.
Let Frank be your egg in this trying time.
Mothra is my distant cousin but we haven’t met. Yet.
Pretty much. Just put a phone in her hand & it’s me.
Maybe it’s time to re-watch the original Red Dawn.
Tank Girl!
It was great to be a kid before cell phones lol.
Unmute please.
Sorry about the selfie.
Mood
Shine on babes!
One year you bully us the next year you’re trying to buy drugs off us smdh
Anyone remember Bart Simpson acid?
Pooka tax. Love each other, love critters, and no matter what- keep your sense of humor.
item.dc:creator: mothmam
